title: School Gallery
description: Education remains one of the core pillars of Reshma Foundation’s mission to create lasting social change. The foundation has supported students from economically challenged backgrounds by assisting with educational fees and ensuring that financial hardship does not become a barrier to learning. Essential study materials including notebooks, pencils, pens, and academic supplies were distributed to encourage continued education and academic growth. To improve school infrastructure and student well-being, Reshma Foundation also constructed sanitation facilities for a government school in Korattur with an investment of approximately ₹3.5 lakhs, creating a safer and healthier learning environment for future generations.
